title: Multi-Region Active-Active Architecture
author: Dakota Lee
Cloud Architect
description: Deploy globally with active-active multi-region—but split-brain scenarios cause data loss
content:
Active-active deployment across regions provides low latency and high availability, but introduces complex consistency challenges.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Global Split-Brain (2037)](/docs/articles/global-split-brain-2037)
